boss.name: The Eternal Warden

pickup.effect: Powers mechanical locks and temporarily slows enemies.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone triggers the emergency lock release, opening the path to the Reactor Core.

pickup.effect: Focuses light to reveal temporal anomalies and weaknesses.
pickup.name: Temporal Lens

pickup.effect: Anchors reality, required to neutralize the boss.

encounters.trigger: Using the Temporal Lens to reveal the Phantom's core pulls the Boss from the future to the present.
